jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ module system compatibility.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in modern JDKs; while not strictly a compile error in all plugin versions, using 'release' is required to correctly set the boot classpath and ensure API compatibility with the target JDK version (Java 17).

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling for Java 17 or may have bugs with newer language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 17 due to module system changes or internal API usage.
